---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or an improvement to an existing one
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

<!--
Describe the curator workflow gap or pain point this feature would address.
Who is affected? What are they currently doing instead?
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
A concrete description of the feature, if you have one in mind.
Skip this section if you only want to describe the problem and let the team propose an approach.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
What other approaches did you think about? Why did you not pick them?
This helps the team understand the design space without re-deriving it.
-->

## Scope

- [ ] Backend change only
- [ ] Frontend change only
- [ ] Both
- [ ] New external dependency (which? why?)
- [ ] Schema change (would touch generated/ types and Pydantic mirrors)

## Phase fit

<!--
If you've read the existing phases, where would this slot in?
-->

- [ ] Extends an existing phase (which?)
- [ ] Should be its own new phase
- [ ] Not sure

## Additional context

<!--
Links to similar features in other tools (OpenRefine, Transkribus, etc.), screenshots, references.
-->
